commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/project_dag.py tests/test_project_dag.py
uv run pytest tests/test_project_dag.py tests/test_handoff_dispatch.py tests/test_generated_ticket.py tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_run_status.py -q

proves: DAG contracts can reuse the same agent role across multiple node IDs.
Tau writes a run-local DAG agent registry so node IDs are routable without relaxing the global agent registry.
Handoff-loop DAG dispatch addresses command specs by node ID while retaining node.agent as the role recorded in observed edges.
Bounded ready-queue dispatch also addresses nodes by node ID and preserves role metadata in receipts.
does_not_prove: semantic reviewer quality beyond declared reviewer_verdict evidence
